You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr. Vandan Tewari Professor in Department of Computer Engineering is working in the field of Data Analysis, Data Mining and ap-plications of machine learning; Data appropriateness for learning algorithms is the crux of machine learning and she is an avid learner in this area. Actively involved in doing research since 2002. Completed PhD in Computer Engineering in 2015 She has published various research papers in the renowed journals and conferences. PhD Supervision: S.
